properties./Patient_Population: concat( toUpperCase( substring( toLowerCase(/Patient_Population), 0, 1 ) ), substring( toLowerCase(/Patient_Population), 1, -1 ) )

attributes-to-ignore-regex.name: attributes-to-ignore-regex
attributes-to-ignore-regex.displayName: Attributes to Ignore by Regular Expression

attributes-to-log-regex.name: attributes-to-log-regex
attributes-to-log-regex.displayName: Attributes to Log by Regular Expression

properties./Dataset_Description: Collection of patients with glioblastoma multiforme confirmed by biopsy and MR
properties./TumorMarker1_TumorMarkerCode: Percent of cell nuclei positive for proliferation marker protein Ki-67 in primary malignant neoplasm by immunohistochemistry

properties.mapping HealthStatus1_TestCode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'NONE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'NONE' AS originalValue,
		'HealthStatus1_TestCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "HealthStatus1_TestCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Gender' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Gender" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Histology:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'D-Pathologycal subtype' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"D-Pathologycal subtype" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Primary Cancer Condition:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AssertedDate" AS AssertedDate,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		"Age Unit" AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept__code" AS AgeUnitEUCAIM,
		"Histological Type" AS PrimaryCancerConditionOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Code__code" AS PrimaryCancerConditionEUCAIM,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_confirmedBy" AS ConfirmedByProcedure,
        "D-Pathologycal subtype" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode__code" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourEUCAIM,
		"Organ" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySiteCode__code" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"Tumor location" AS BodySiteLocationQualifierOriginal,
		'TODO' AS BodySiteLocationQualifierEUCAIM,
		"Side of tumor epicenter" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySiteLaterality__code" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierEUCAIM
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping HealthStatus1_TestValueAsConcept:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'ASA Classification System (performance status)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"ASA Classification System (performance status)" AS originalValue,
		'HealthStatus1_TestValueAsConcept' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "HealthStatus1_TestValueAsConcept__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitCo:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Age Unit' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Age Unit" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySiteLocation:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Tumor location' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Tumor location" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySiteLocation' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        'TODO' AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySiteLaterality:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Side of tumor epicenter' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Side of tumor epicenter" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySiteLaterality' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySiteLaterality__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Dataset:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Title" AS	Title,
		"Dataset_Description" AS Description
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Patient:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Patient_DatasetIdentifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Population" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Patient_Population__code" AS DiagnosticCategoryEucaim,
		"Gender" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex__code" AS BirthSexEucaim
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Histological Type' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Histological Type" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_Code__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping CancerRelatedProcedure1_Procedur:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Pathology Confirmation' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Pathology Confirmation" AS originalValue,
		'CancerRelatedProcedure1_ProcedureCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "CancerRelatedProcedure1_ProcedureCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Tumor Marker Test:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		'Ki-67' AS	TumorMarkerOriginal,
		"TumorMarker1_TumorMarkerCode__code" AS TumorMarkerEUCAIM,
		REPLACE("TumorMarker1_ValueAsNumber", '?', '-1') AS ValueAsNumber
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping ImagingProcedure1_ImagingProcedu:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'NONE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'NONE' AS originalValue,
		'ImagingProcedure1_ImagingProcedureCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "ImagingProcedure1_ImagingProcedureCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping TumorMarker1_TumorMarkerCode:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'NONE' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'NONE' AS originalValue,
		'TumorMarker1_TumorMarkerCode__code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "TumorMarker1_TumorMarkerCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_DiagnosticCategory:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Population' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Population" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_DiagnosticCategory' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_DiagnosticCategory" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Episode:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Episode1_Type" AS TypeOriginal,
		"Episode1_Number" AS EpisodeNumber
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Tumor_BodySite:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Organ' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Organ" AS originalValue,
		'Tumor_BodySiteCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Tumor_BodySiteCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping HistologicGrade_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Tumor Grade' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Tumor Grade" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyCode__code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Health Status:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		'ASA Classification' AS HealthStatusOriginal,
		"HealthStatus1_TestCode__code" AS HealthStatusEUCAIM,
		"HealthStatus1_TestValueAsConcept__code" AS ValueAsConceptEUCAIM,
		"ASA Classification System (performance status)" AS ValueAsConceptOriginal
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Cancer Procedure:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_confirmedBy" AS Identifier,
		"CancerRelatedProcedure1_ProcedureCode__code" AS ProcedureEUCAIM,
		"Pathology Confirmation" AS ProcedureOriginal,
		"CancerRelatedProcedure1_PerformedDate" AS PerformedDate
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 3 for clinical data:
* Clinical data tabular inputs are mapped and converted to a relational model.
* Mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
